name: Cold Open — Ledger Drift
description: Nine days into a mining run on an unclaimed drift. Wake up, work the claim, and learn why quiet in the Reach is a countdown. Beats 0-2 of the Duskway Run demo.

stages.objective: Find Tove in the galley — she has the shift briefing
Take the ship out — hit Launch when you're ready
Mine raw ore from the drift — hold F near a rock
CONTACT — drive off the ambusher (CTRL to fire)

soul_mutations.text: A reaver skiff jumped us over the claim and the captain flew us out the other side of it. Filed the engine whine for later — that hull was Corp Charter surplus with the markings burned off.

stages.objective: The hull is bleeding — spin the drive and jump for Sorrow Station (J). The pods are waiting.

epilogue.failure:
The drift keeps what it kills. The Loup-Garou joins nine days of tailings and one pirate's good afternoon, and Sorrow Station's second wall gets seven more names nobody authorized.

[i]The Reach doesn't care who you are. It just waits.[/i]

failure_reasons.ship_destroyed:
The skiff's third pass finds the crack in the patch armor. The drift keeps what it kills — and Sorrow Station's second wall, the small one nobody authorized, gets seven more names.

[i]The Reach doesn't care who you are. It just waits.[/i]
